nodes.label: P2.0 synth control — DECIDE fork (ENTANGLED, not LOST)
nodes.rationale: Same 4-bar layout on synth Tier-B: SCFF 0.918, RAND 0.912, raw 0.961, pure-GD 0.955 -> selectivity slightly positive, gap-vs-ceiling +0.036 -> ENTANGLED (info present, fixable by interface) not LOST. The selectivity control here is what proves RAW~=GD on synth, i.e. the max-power probe solves from raw pixels -- the CIFAR LOST verdict is real, not a probe artifact.
